image:image.image:title: Hampta Pass Crossover Trek Himachal
image:image.image:caption: Hikers traversing the snow ridge at Hampta Pass summit, Himachal Pradesh, India

image:image.image:title: Beas Kund Glacial Lake Trek
image:image.image:caption: Prsitine emerald glacial lake at the source of Beas River, Manali

image:image.image:title: Mystic Dayara Bugyal Meadows Trek
image:image.image:caption: Vast alpine green meadows of Dayara Bugyal, Uttarakhand

image:image.image:title: Valley of Flowers National Park Uttarakhand
image:image.image:caption: Beautiful mountain valley carpeted with wildflowers, UNESCO site

image:image.image:title: Kedarkantha Snow Peak Summit
image:image.image:caption: Trekkers climbing the snowy summit ridge of Kedarkantha in winter

image:image.image:title: Dzongri Ridge Expedition Sikkim
image:image.image:caption: Panoramic views of Mount Kanchenjunga from the Dzongri Ridge top

image:image.image:title: Goechala Pass Trek Sikkim
image:image.image:caption: The massive face of Mt Kanchenjunga from Goechala view point

image:image.image:title: Kashmir Great Lakes Alpine Traverse
image:image.image:caption: Beautiful clear blue alpine lake surrounded by green valleys in Kashmir

image:image.image:title: Tarsar Marsar Twin Lakes Kashmir
image:image.image:caption: Campsite pitched on the green banks of Tarsar Lake, Aru Valley

image:image.image:title: Markha Valley Cold Desert Trek Ladakh
image:image.image:caption: Stupas and canyon routes in the barren Markha Valley, Ladakh

image:image.image:title: Kudremukh Peak Grasslands Karnataka
image:image.image:caption: Lush rolling green hills and shola cloud forests of Kudremukh peak

image:image.image:title: Kumara Parvatha Ridge Trail Karnataka
image:image.image:caption: Climbing past Shesha Parvatha cliff trails to Kumara Parvatha peak

image:image.image:title: Kokankada Cliff Harishchandragad Maharashtra
image:image.image:caption: The massive 1,800 ft vertical drop horseshoe cliff of Kokankada

image:image.image:title: Kalsubai Peak Ladder Climb Maharashtra
image:image.image:caption: Climbing the steel ladders leading to the highest point of Maharashtra

image:image.image:title: Meesapulimala Peak Cloud Valley Kerala
image:image.image:caption: Misty cloud valleys and tea estates of Meesapulimala, Munnar
